name: A100 Architecture Optimization
trigger: A100, sm_80, Ampere, compute_80, A100-80GB, A100-40GB
approach: Target A100 architecture: 108 SMs, 164KB shared memory per SM (configurable up to 163KB), 2039 GB/s HBM2e bandwidth (80GB variant) or 1555 GB/s (40GB variant), 312 TFLOPS FP16. Use 256-thread blocks, vectorized half2 loads. Grid multiples of 108. L2 cache is 40MB. Register pressure: 65536 registers per SM.
pitfalls: Shared memory can be configured to 163KB but reduces occupancy — default 48KB per block is safer
A100-40GB has 1555 GB/s vs A100-80GB at 2039 GB/s — benchmark results differ significantly
TF32 is default for torch.matmul on A100 — custom kernels must explicitly handle precision
